protocol.gt_use: metrics only; never read by prompt or inference functions
protocol.A_basic_box: ordinary score boxes + highest SAM confidence; no feedback
protocol.B_road_box: road-aware adaptive boxes + highest SAM confidence; no feedback
protocol.C_boundary_select: B + inside-versus-ring boundary selection; no feedback
protocol.D_full_feedback: C + accepted-mask feedback into the continuous heatmap
protocol.expected_identity: C and D share the same binary masks; D tests heatmap ranking only
